lastSyncedNote: After 6.6.4 release: added charity donations to the Corporate Days & Charity Events card. Reframed the no-account-to-score messaging across index.html (Professional & Casual Tournaments and Corporate Days feature cards, the share-the-link invite step, and the 'Does every player need to sign up?' FAQ in both the visible accordion and the JSON-LD schema) so it reflects that participants enter scores with no app download or account required, not only by scanning a printed scorecard/cart-sign QR code. SHA pinned to 7f012487 (the Release 6.6.4 (664) commit).
